---
title: "GW4+ Thematic meeting: Climate change and Hazards - University of Bristol"
description: "I presented the preliminar results of my project"
author: "News"
date: "2026-01-28"
categories: [event]
image: "/posts/202601-Gw4ThematicMeeting/Juan_gw4Jan2026.jpg"
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

## Summary

I presented a poster about the preliminary results of my fire experiment in Chapada dos Veadeiros in Brasil

![](Juan_gw4Jan2026.jpg){width="334"}

<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
